channel.title: Hey, I'm Masara and this my digital space on This is Masara
channel.description: Recent content in Hey, I'm Masara and this my digital space on This is Masara

item.title: How I Built This Blog (Step by Step, With Real Commands)
item.description:
Hey 👋
If you’re reading this, my blog actually works — which still feels a little unreal.

I wanted my first post to document exactly how I built this site. Not just the idea, but the actual commands, mistakes, and workflow that got everything live.

This is the post I wish I had when I started.

Why Hugo + GitHub Pages?

I wanted a setup that was:

  • 💸 Free
  • ⚡ Fast
  • 🧠 Simple
  • 📝 Markdown-based
  • 🔄 Fully version controlled
  • 🗄️ No database to maintain

Hugo and GitHub Pages checked every box.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
About Me

Hey👋 , I’m James Angwenyi alias Masara

I like figuring out how things work — and sometimes how they don’t.

Most days I’m exploring systems, ideas, and the internet’s weird corners, usually with a terminal open and too many tabs.

Somewhere in there, I work in cybersecurity — basically learning how things break so I can help keep them safe.

I learn by doing: break things safely, fix them, then write it down so future-me remembers.

item.title: Portfolio
item.description: A collection of projects I’ve built during my journey as a digital nomad and tech professional.

item.title: Social Media
item.description:
Follow My Journey

Stay updated with my latest adventures, tech insights, and nomad life experiences across different social media platforms.

Where to Find Me

Connect with me on various platforms where I share different aspects of my journey - from tech tutorials to travel vlogs and daily life updates.

item.title: The Art of Not Panicking
item.description:
The Art of Not Panicking 🧘🏽‍♂️

“You can’t solve a problem with the same mind that created it.”
Okay relax — we’re not about to get philosophical 😅

I’m not really a writer.
I don’t journal.
But I figured maybe trying this out might help me think clearer.

Lately I’ve been thinking about stress.

Just normal life stress.
Deadlines. Expectations. Things breaking at the worst time.
Life doing what life does.

item.title: Travel Timeline
item.description: Follow my adventures as a digital nomad, exploring different cities and cultures while building amazing projects.
